creator: mwm@mired.org
text:
In a fit (of some kind), I wrote man pages for make.conf and and
build. Jkh took a look, and said:

From: Jordan Hubbard <jkh@winston.osd.bsdi.com>
To: Mike Meyer <mwm@mired.org>
Subject: Re: make.conf man page? 
Date: Tue, 07 Nov 2000 13:59:32 -0800

Look good to me, submit 'em as PRs so somebody from the docs team can
commit them.  I'm too busy with 4.2 to even contemplate it at the
moment. :)

Fix: Commit the two man pages in the attached shar file.
How-To-Repeat: 
Try "man make.conf" or "man build".
